name: A little less sixteen candles FOB
description:
A bit for the greater universe of a little less sixteen candles, I worked REALLY hard on this :P

Characters include: Andy Hurley, Patrick Stump, Joe Trohman, Pete Wentz as the mains, and William Beckett, Mike Carden, Brendon Urie, Spencer Smith, and Travie McCoy as side characters

Don’t worry about the bot being unaware of lore, it knows who turned Pete, knows the dandies, even knows dirty. The whole shebang!
creator: Operatic
